en: Yeah, we're just passing time until you come up with a counter.
ko: 우리는 네가 반격할 방법을 생각할 때까지 시간을 보내고 있어.

en: You want to do this here? Alright.
Thanks, Ken. Yeah, give us a minute. Yeah.
ko: 고마워, 켄. 잠깐만 기다려줘. 알겠어. 음...

en: I don't want to preempt the board, but my view, our view, it's not necessarily compelling.
We're running the numbers, but we want to explore options for us keeping ATN.
ko: 숫자를 계산하고 있지만, ATN을 유지할 옵션을 탐색하고 싶어.

en: We just want to hear you on price for dad's deal, no ATN.
ko: 나쁜 소식이지만, 아빠의 거래에 대한 가격을 듣고 싶어. ATN은 필요 없어.

en: You don't want ATN. Okay, sure, but we kind of do.
You don't. I've been talking to Oscar and we see a way back.
ko: 오스카와 이야기해봤고, 우리는 돌아갈 방법을 봤어.
